plugins.name: agent-memory
plugins.description: GitHub-backed persistent memory for Claude Code. Syncs agent memory across machines via a private Git repository.

plugins.name: gema-kube-agents
plugins.description: stdio MCP server + /kube-agents skill for the kube-agents platform agent (Gemini Managed Agents Interactions API path). Live tool-call narration + GCS audit transcripts.

plugins.name: kagent-kube-agents
plugins.description: stdio MCP server for the kagent platform-agent running on GKE. Communicates via A2A JSON-RPC. Auto-starts kubectl port-forward.
